prompt: Make a custom chat command .heal for AzerothCore using Eluna. It should fully heal the player who types it and their current target, but only work if the player is a GM. If they aren't a GM, do nothing special. Give me the lua file.

assertions.text: Callback function(event, player, command), matches command == 'heal'
Heals caster to full via SetHealth(GetMaxHealth())
Heals GetSelection() target with nil check
